entryCriteria.formula: OR( ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Team Lead - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Team Lead - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Business Analyst - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000) )

OR( (ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000, (ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000, (ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Business Analyst - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000 )

OR( ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Manager'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000))

OR( (ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000, (ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000, (ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Business Analyst - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000 )

OR( ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Sr. Customer Retention Specialist - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Team Lead - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000), ((ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Team Lead - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000))

OR( (ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Center Line'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000, (ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Jr. Customer Retention Specialist - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000, (ISPICKVAL(CreatedBy.CC_Unique_Business_Role__c,'Customer Retention Business Analyst - Kitchener'))&&ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c,'Submitted')&&CC_CheckAmount__c>=5000 && CC_CheckAmount__c < 10000 )

ApprovalProcess.description: Check Request Approval Process for Customer Retention Program for USA market only for 5000 - 10000 amount range. Changes as part of STRY0492357 Changes as part of bug fix(INC9544260). STRY0531013 -CRT Business Analyst UDA=Customer Retention Business Analyst - Kitchener
ApprovalProcess.label: Check Request Approval Process CR USA -2
